name: Uncovering Latent Reasoning Strategies in Language Models

description: arXiv:2607.17674v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: A language model $p_\theta(y \mid x)$ trained on reasoning tasks learns to solve problems via multiple distinct strategies, yet these strategies are implicit and entangled within the model's response distribution. We study the problem of decomposing the response distribution of a given pretrained language model into a structured, strategy-condit...
author: Awni Altabaa, John Lafferty
